ogTitle: Seacombe Gardens vs Seacombe Heights: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Seacombe Gardens and Seacombe Heights.
heading: Seacombe Gardens vs Seacombe Heights — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Seacombe Gardens, South Australia and Seacombe Heights, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Seacombe Gardens has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Seacombe Heights (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Seacombe Gardens or Seacombe Heights safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Seacombe Gardens has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Seacombe Heights scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Seacombe Gardens scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. Seacombe Heights scores 43/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Seacombe Gardens or Seacombe Heights?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Seacombe Gardens has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.77% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
